name: Best Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together butter and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add granulated sugar, egg, and vanilla extract; beat well.
4. Mix in flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
5. Stir in oats, raisins, and chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Flatten with fork or bottom of spoon.
8. Bake for 8-9 minutes for chewy cookies, or 10-11 minutes for crisp cookies.
9. Allow to cool on wire rack for 1 minute before removing from oven.
